---
name: Rule request
about: A command that should match locally but currently falls back to the AI
labels: rule
---

**Command(s) to match**

```
# one per line
git <command you want>
```

**Expected local command to run**

```
<the shell command that would be equivalent>
```

**Safety tier** (pick one): read-only / write-confined / write-network

**Notes / edge cases**
